images.alt: A hyper-surreal photographic depiction of insomnia, landscape orientation. A woman lies awake on a floating bed adrift across a reflective cosmic ocean beneath spiraling staircases leading to suspended doors in the sky. Melting silver clocks drip from the stars, constellation sheep leap through impossible portals, and a vast dark vortex pulls fragments of bedrooms, windows, and furniture into its center. Multiple moons hang at different scales overhead while glowing clock hands swim beneath the water. Dreamlike gravity, impossible architecture, cinematic moonlight, deep blues and silver highlights, atmospheric haze, surreal fashion-editorial photography, haunting, hyper-detailed, photorealistic.

embed.alt: A tight 15-second comedic scene set in a cluttered home office during tax season, desk piled high with receipts, folders, and tax paperwork. A frustrated middle-aged man stands over the desk flipping through documents, becoming increasingly furious. He slams a stack of papers down and launches into an angry tirade: “You’ve completely botched my taxes! None of these numbers make any sense! I trusted you with this and now it’s a complete disaster! Do you realize what kind of trouble this could cause me?” Cut to a reverse reveal of the “accountant” sitting behind the desk: a tiny toddler wearing oversized glasses and a comically large button-down shirt like business attire, barely visible behind a laptop and stacks of paperwork. The toddler shrugs and calmly replies in a small voice, “What’d you expect? I’m only three.”

images.alt:
A graceful female figure dances across a reflective floor inside a luminous interior framed by towering stained-glass windows. Her body appears sculpted from twisting strands of dark amber resin and polished wood-like textures, forming an elegant gown that spirals around her in sweeping motion. Delicate sheets resembling fractured stained glass extend from her dress and hair, creating wing-like arcs that trail behind her as if frozen in a gust of wind. Warm sunlight pours through the glowing windows in shades of gold, orange, cream, and ruby red, illuminating countless translucent fragments suspended around her. Her arms stretch outward in a balanced pose, emphasizing movement and poise. Fine shards and sparkling particles drift through the air, while the glossy floor mirrors the figure and surrounding light. The overall scene blends sculpture, fashion, and fantasy into a radiant display of motion, texture, and warmth, with intricate organic details visible throughout the dress and flowing extensions.
Keywords:
dancer, amber, stained glass, resin, sculpture, movement, sunlight, elegance, fantasy, reflection, flowing gown, cathedral

images.alt:
A monochrome close-up portrait emerges from behind a translucent shower curtain streaked with moisture and soft distortions. The figure is partially concealed, with only one eye, part of the nose, and the faint suggestion of a smile visible through a narrow opening in the curtain. Wet strands of dark hair cling to the face and hang across the visible eye, creating an unsettling sense of intimacy and intrusion. The curtain dominates most of the frame, its foggy texture blurring and obscuring the subject while allowing fragments of detail to emerge. High contrast lighting creates deep shadows along the right side of the image while soft highlights illuminate the curtain’s folds and droplets. The composition is tightly cropped, forcing the viewer into close proximity with the hidden figure. The visible eye appears focused directly outward, creating a feeling of being watched. The overall atmosphere balances mystery and menace, transforming an ordinary bathroom setting into a scene of psychological suspense and quiet dread.
Keywords:
shower curtain, portrait, monochrome, hidden face, wet hair, close-up, suspense, psychological horror, obscured figure, shadow, voyeuristic, eerie
AI-generated; use is permitted for non-commercial creative projects. MidJourney, FLUX.1-schnell model via Perchance, Artspace.ai, REVE, Echoform™.

Fudge is a sweet and creamy confection made from sugar, butter, and milk or cream.
It is typically flavored with chocolate, although other flavors such as vanilla, peanut butter, and maple are also popular.
To make fudge, sugar, butter, and milk or cream are heated together and stirred constantly until the mixture thickens and reaches a soft-ball stage. This is when a small amount of the mixture dropped into cold water forms a soft ball that can be easily flattened.
Once the mixture has reached the desired consistency, it is removed from heat and flavorings such as chocolate or vanilla are added. The mixture is then beaten vigorously until it becomes thick and creamy, before being poured into a pan and left to set. 
Fudge can be enjoyed in many different ways, such as plain or topped with nuts, sprinkles, or other candies. It can be served at room temperature, chilled, or even melted and used as a topping for ice cream or other desserts. Fudge is a popular treat during the holidays, and is often given as a gift or served at parties and gatherings.

Then ask it to write a 200-word LinkedIn post for a freelance photographer targeting small business owners, using a casual tone, ending with a call to action to book a free consultation. Compare the two outputs. That gap is prompt engineering. It's alive and it's the difference between wasting your time and getting work done. (3/4)

record.bridgyOriginalText: The Truth: AI models are getting better at guessing what you mean. But guessing isn't the same as understanding. When you throw a vague prompt at AI at 2 AM from your couch, you get vague results. The people who actually get great output are the ones who learned how to structure their requests. Prompt engineering isn't dying. It's evolving. The bar for good enough is rising, not falling. (2/4)
